segments.text: I am the man that hath seen affliction by the rod of his wrath.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: He hath led me, and brought me into darkness, but not into light.
It is of the LORD's mercies that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The LORD is my portion, saith my soul; therefore will I hope in him.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Who is he that saith, and it cometh to pass, when the Lord commandeth it not?
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Let us search and try our ways, and turn again to the LORD.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: I called upon thy name, O LORD, out of the low dungeon.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Render unto them a recompence, O LORD, according to the work of their hands.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah
